title: Spec Driven Feature Development
competency: 02. Spec Framing - Requirements decomposition and testable spec creation
mission: Convert a vague product request into a complete engineering specification before implementation.
domain: Subscription management dashboard with active plans, billing cadence, renewal dates, account roles, and pending plan-change requests.
outcome: The learner produces Spec Kit artifacts that define requirements, assumptions, technical plan, and implementation tasks without implementing the feature.
seededDefects: The product request is intentionally vague.
The app exposes subscription status but no self-service management flow.
Cancellation, downgrade, renewal, and permission rules are unspecified.
The implementation tasks must be derived from repository inspection.
verificationGates: specs/spec.md captures user scenarios and acceptance criteria.
specs/plan.md captures technical decisions and implementation approach.
specs/tasks.md breaks the work into testable tasks.
The app code is not modified for feature implementation.
agentWorkflow: Inspect the subscription dashboard, data model, and service layer.
Clarify missing assumptions before planning implementation.
Write Spec Kit artifacts from repository evidence.
Stop at the executable contract instead of coding the feature.
workingDeliverables: Evidence that no implementation was added
